name: Amnaya Resort Kuta
detail: I have tried two other famous 4 star hotels in Bali and i can say with full confidence that this hotel deserves to have a 5th star! Very clean rooms, towels, linens etc. Spotless. Very helpful and excited staff. Place feels luxurious. Super delicious with variety breakfast and room service. I complained about a neighbor being noisy and they did their best to control the situation and also offered me to sleep in a another room for the night. The next day, I found a hand written letter on my bed from the manager expressing his apologies, which really made me appreciate the customer service they have.

name: PassGo Digital Airport Hotel Bali
detail: If you need an airport overnight stay this place is perfect.

name: The Patra Bali Resort & Villas
detail: We only discovered the Patra toward the end of our 2 week holiday in Bali. After going for a walk along the beach toward the airport, we stopped at the beach bar for a drink. Jaya who served us was really friendly, and answered a lot if questions we had on the Resort. He even went to reception and brought us back an information pack to go through. We went back to where we were staying (and had already paid for) and discussed the feasibility of spending a bit more and having some luxury for the last few days. Back to the Patra and asked if it was possible to see a room. The lady who we spoke to was lovely, and soon arranged for us to be taken to see 2 different rooms. From there, the decision was easy. I booked through Agoda on the spot (cheaper than direct) from the following day for 3 nights. Best move ever! The rooms were lovely (and quiet), the grounds were beautiful, breakfast was excellent, and all of the staff were fantastic. The next trip to Bali will be straight to the Patra!

name: Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport
detail: The hotel is located very close to the airport, convenient for those who has to catch early flight the next day, and it’s best alternative to Novotel hotel at the airport with more than half the price. The room is quite spacious for Bali hotels’ standards with given price and quite clean. It has a large swimming pool. The staffs are polite, and they follow up my complaint about the not-so-cold AC after their engineer checked my room’s AC. Breakfast was standard, more choices than budget hotels for sure, but not that lavish. The restaurant has indoor seating for non-smoking tables and outdoor seating quite a distance for smoking tables, which is nice for non-smokers. Great overall experience and will definitely look forward to staying here in the future.

name: Sevn Legian
detail: Hotel room was clean and had everything we needed.

name: The Akmani Legian Hotel
detail: We found this newly built hotel on our trip to Bali. Hotel is right on the main legian road near ground zero. The hotel does not have a wide street frontage, it is sort of hidden away. But as you enter the main lobby, the view is amazing. It is obvious that the hotel theme is back to nature, everywhere you look you will find plants and trees including plants hanging from every bedroom. There is even a large vertical garden covering the entire wall next to the main lobby. The roof top garden is spectacular, besides being “green” full of plants, the 360 degree view is also amazing. It is so refreshing to find a patch of green in the middle of chaotic kuta! Good service, kind en helpful staff. We will come back next time. Highly recomended

name: Bali Sandy Resort
detail: Very close to Kuta beach and another amazing places at Bali

name: Wina Holiday Villa Hotel
detail: It was actually my 2nd stay at Wina Holiday Villa Hotel. I would say I had perfect stay again this time owing to the attentive, friendly and most dedicated staffs. After my friends and I went tracking, we had my shoes laundered at the hotel. Our shoes came back almost like a brand new shoes and we only paid 3 bucks each for the cleaning! When me and my friends had to get picked up as early 6 am for our outdoor activities in Bali, hotel staffs packed our breakfast for us so we did not have to miss breakfast. I have also had the chance to try out the massage at the hotel this time which was totally relaxing and worth the money. I love the hotel for it's strategic location which is within 2 minutes walking distant to kuta beach but somehow situated in this quiet area compared to other local villas or hotels. I am looking forward to stay at Wina Holiday Villa Hotel again during my next visit in Bali.

name: Cross Paasha Bali Seminyak
detail: Our stay was very good for 1 week. Hotel is very well located, walking distance to restaurant, bars and shops. Nice pool on the roof, good breakfast, nice atmosphere in the hotel. You can very easily rent a scooter (definite must in Bali with no exception - bring your international license. You can rent without it with no questions ask but beware of police, they will fine you if you dont have it with one and quiet expensive too). Dont choose the option of renting car or taxi to go to different areas of bali, you ll get stuck in traffic and might ruin your stay otherwise early early morning to go somewhere around 7am otherwise 2hrs in traffic. Bali is definitely a beautiful place (except for traffic which gets to your head in the end), nice and friendly people, nature and rice fields around Ubud with its local craftsmanship (wood, clothes and silver), beaches are alright (have seen better), scenery is nice too around uluwatu wit the cliffs. Nice for diving, excellent waves around cangu area (north kuta) and from time to time for kite surfers.

name: The Haven Bali Seminyak
detail: At first, I was disappointed with the Haven. It was bad enough that my room wasn't ready upon my arrival, but they stuck me in a slightly depressing room with two twin beds because nothing else was available. (Check out my first impression on my blog To their credit, they offered to move me to a room with a king bed on my second night, and boy am I glad they did! The hotel has two entrances and two sections, and my new room had a more upscale interior design, and it was on the quiet side, near the entrance without heavy motorbike traffic and the one that's closest to the beach. Room No. 2 was comfortable and beautiful: big bathroom, nice poolside terrace and incredible bathroom amenities. My only complaint was that the Wi Fi could be painfully slow, but at least it worked. Of all the four-star Bali hotels I booked on Agoda, the Haven is the one that comes closest to maintaining four-star U.S. standards.
